ast.name: prompt
ast.source: Paste an Overboard board URL (e.g. https://overboard.studio/board/abc123):
ast.target: 粘贴一个 Overboard 看板 URL（例如 https://overboard.studio/board/abc123）：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Height of the iframe inside your notes. Boards scroll/zoom internally so 600 is a reasonable default.
ast.target: 笔记内 iframe 的高度。看板内部可滚动/缩放，因此 600 是一个合理的默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Let embedded boards request fullscreen mode.
ast.target: 允许嵌入的看板请求全屏模式。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Overboard: invalid board URL or ID. Expected https://overboard.studio/board/<id> or a bare board ID.
ast.target: Overboard：无效的看板 URL 或 ID。期望格式为 https://overboard.studio/board/<id> 或一个纯看板 ID。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Open new Overboard board in browser
ast.target: 在浏览器中打开新的 Overboard 看板

ast.name: text
ast.source: You sign in to Overboard inside the embedded iframe — the plugin never sees your credentials. All board data, AI generation, and collaboration runs on overboard.studio.
ast.target: 您在嵌入的 iframe 内登录 Overboard——插件永远不会看到您的凭据。所有看板数据、AI 生成和协作都在 overboard.studio 上运行。
